home.title: whispers of time
subtitleLines: to my love and best friend.
gonna be a long read but i hope you enjoy this gift!

entries.text:
HAPPY BIRTHDAY BABYYYYY can’t believe you’re 19 :) this website is actually meant to be a two part gift so don’t even think of trying to get into the anniversary page yet. i’m watching you. LOLLL i actually started working on this since i last visited you in january so i was surprised to say the least when you gifted me a website for valentines day (you totally stole my idea (i’m just kidding i loved that website so much and still look back on it and listen to the playlist hahahah))

but seriously, not only am i so proud of you but also that i get to watch you (and myself) evolve overtime.

gallery.title: our memories
gallery.subtitle:
we've come so far even when we didn't know it
click to reveal!

items.alt: A soft purple sunset over a calm ocean
items.caption: Fading light, August 2024.

items.alt: A quiet room with lavender walls
items.caption: The quiet room.

items.title: lines from our favorite game
lines: and the universe said i love you
and the universe said you are stronger than you know
and the universe said you are the daylight
and the universe said you are the night
and the universe said I love you because you are love.

items.title: love is to change
lines: slowly but surely, I changed.
now, when someone asks me what love is,
i imagine your face.
the way you smile and laugh,
how you softly hold my face,
and how you look at me with joy.

items.title: all yours
lines: I would tie your shoes,
dry your hair if you're tired,
buy you snacks at midnight
peel oranges for you while we talk
answer your rage baiting questions
hug you tight every time I see you.

items.title: thoughts
lines: you will always be you,
and I will always be me.
forever separate and never the same.
but I hope you never forget,
that I am yours and you are mine.
and that I will always be here for you.

entries.text:
Happy anniversary my love :) I can’t believe we’ve already been dating for a year. But I guess at the same time I also can’t believe it’s only been a year!

And who knows! Maybe i’ll add some stuff to this website in the distant future…. But that’s another surprise for another time :)
